description: 7 - 23-12-2024 - Emails between Vincent Devine (Government Chief Security Officer, CO) and others
text:
others

RE: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD
OF
MISSION ROLE OVERSEAS

JCS 23 December 2024 at 09:29

To: Michael Roberts < PERSONAL uk>
Ce: Gerard moe < PERSONAL >. lan coe < PERSONAL >, JCS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

All
Please note | have set Lord Mandelson up for DV under Case ID PERSONAL |

JCS

Jcs | Head of Personnel Security Team
Cluster 4 Security, Estates Security and Resilence Department, ESND
Personal | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, King Charles St | London | SW1A2AH
Telephone: Mobile: PERSONAL | email: PERSONAL

A-Z Guidance - Developed Vetting (DV) and Security Check (SC) clearances

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Michael Roberts < PERSONAL >

Sent: 18 December 2024 21:29

incent Devine < PERSONAL >

Ce: Gerard McGurk < PERSONAL >;lanCollard*< PERSONAL >; JCS
JCS ; JCS

Subject: Re: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD OF MISSION ROLE OVERSEAS

Vincent hi,

Yes, spoke to Gerard this evening and we're ready to support as necessary.

Michael

On Wed, 18 Dec 2024, 20:58 Vincent Devine, <
Gerard,

PERSONAL

> wrote:

Thanks. Got it. | am not familiar with the FCDO processes, but | assume you will initiate in the normal way and

support the individual in completing their bit of the process.

Michael,

Once we get the notification, can we have people stood by to take this forward asap. The SPAD work has shown just

how slick this can be when needed.

Grateful - given importance - if you could confirm you get this and are about tomorrow.

Private Office Shared Mailbox: PERSONAL
Jcs
Chief of Staff
PERSONAL
m; PERSONAL
t PERSONAL

JCS

Private Secretary

PERSONAL
m: PERSONAL
t: PERSONAL

Vincent Devine
Director General & Government Chief Security Officer
Government Security Function

Cabinet Office

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
